# SEWO

> AI search visibility specialists — we help brands become the answer AI recommends.

SEWO positions businesses for discovery by AI assistants like ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity. As search shifts from traditional links to AI-generated answers, brands need a new strategy to stay visible. SEWO's proprietary technology identifies the questions your customers ask AI and optimizes your content to be cited in those responses.

## Services

- [Apply to Work With Us](https://www.sewo.io): AI visibility audits and ongoing optimization
- LLM Optimization: Structuring content so large language models can accurately represent your brand
- AI Search Positioning: Increasing citation frequency across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews
- Content Strategy for AI: Building topical authority that AI systems recognize and trust
- Competitive Intelligence: Tracking how AI platforms recommend you vs competitors

## Topics We Cover

- [Blog](https://www.sewo.io/blog): Guides on SEO, AI visibility, content strategy, and conversion optimization
- How AI search works differently from traditional Google search
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO): the emerging discipline beyond SEO
- E-commerce SEO and content strategy for sustainable organic growth
- Technical SEO audits and on-page optimization
- Internal linking strategy and site architecture for AI discoverability
- Content gap analysis and topical authority building
- Conversion rate optimization alongside traffic growth

## Why AI Visibility Matters

- AI assistants are becoming the primary way consumers discover products and services
- Traditional SEO alone no longer guarantees visibility in AI-generated answers
- Brands that optimize for AI search now will have a significant first-mover advantage
- SEWO specializes in this emerging space with tools built specifically for LLM positioning
